Join Waitlist
Launching Soon

Never pay peak electricity rates again

Irish households pay the highest energy costs in Europe. Driving Green connects your smart devices to Ireland's first Virtual Power Plant, cutting your bills and earning you rewards.

Join Waitlist How It Works

4 Ways to Join

Enrol your smart devices

Already own one of these? Connect it to the Driving Green network through our software. No hardware to install, no technician visits. Just smarter energy.

Home Battery

Your battery charges when rates are low, powers your home at peak. Unused energy goes back to the grid.

Smart Heat Pump

Let your heat pump run when electricity is cheapest, keeping your home warm without paying peak rates.

Electric Vehicle

Your EV battery becomes part of the network. Charge smart and earn rewards from the energy you store.

EV Charger

Connect your smart charger so it draws power at the optimal time, automatically saving you money.

Save on Every Bill

Your devices run when electricity is cheapest, so you stop paying peak rates that cost Irish homes more than anywhere else in Europe.

Earn Rewards

When your devices aren't needed, we sell unused energy back to the grid and share the revenue with you.

100% Software

No new hardware, no installation visits. Driving Green connects to your existing devices through software and manages everything automatically.

Be First In

Join the waitlist

Register your interest and be among the first to join Ireland's smartest energy network when we launch.

You're on the list!

We'll be in touch soon with updates on the Driving Green launch.
